MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for U.D. Settlement Conference this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Neveo Mosser.
No appearance by the Defendant: Joseph gonzalez.
The settlement conference if taken off calendar, jury demand is stricken and case to proceed as Court Trial on Monday 9-27-04 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 206.
